raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Decision leverage","name":"Where are you having the most leverage right now?","description":"Surfaces which initiatives are actually moving the business and where the CTO's attention is paying off.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Strategic tradeoff","name":"What are you choosing not to do this cycle?","description":"Reveals explicit deprioritisation and whether the current plan is realistic for a senior leader's bandwidth.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Recovery check","name":"What has made it easier or harder to switch off lately?","description":"Gets beneath generic energy talk to the actual recovery pattern and what is interrupting it.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Sustainable load","name":"What part of your week is starting to feel unsustainable?","description":"Looks for hidden load, overcommitment, or a pattern of running hot before it becomes obvious.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Own the roadmap","name":"Where are you steering the roadmap rather than reacting to it?","description":"Checks for proactive ownership and whether the CTO is shaping direction or just absorbing requests.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Stretch edge","name":"What is stretching you most in the role right now?","description":"Surfaces the current learning edge, whether it's technical depth, leadership scope, or decision-making.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback quality","name":"What kind of feedback would actually help you level up here?","description":"Identifies whether the person is getting useful signal or just generic affirmation.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support gap","name":"What do you want from me that you are not getting?","description":"Surfaces missing manager support in a way that can turn into a concrete change.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Org friction","name":"Where is the organisation getting in the way of the work?","description":"Helps locate structural friction, dependency drag, or process overhead that a CTO feels first.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Impact signal","name":"Which initiative is creating the most real impact?","description":"Forces a concrete read on strategic impact rather than a generic status update.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
